creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 195227
portaudio.diff

The version number is very odd.  Debian calls it 19.6.0 as does upstream in the
release notes.  I think this would be a good time to provide a sane version
even though a PORTEPOCH bump will be necessary to do it.

I want to make other changes to the port though that should land before a
version update so it'll take me some time to commit this.  Let's say in
2 weeks or something.

P.S. We absolutely do not add release notes to pkg-descr.  I'll add them to
the commit message though.
